field_rules.exact_candidate_digest: mandatory for approve, approve_with_conditions, deny, supersede, revoke
field_rules.conditions: must be explicit and testable for approve_with_conditions
field_rules.evidence_set_refs: must identify the exact evidence set reviewed
field_rules.authority_basis: must identify applicable authority and delegation chain where relevant
field_rules.claim_effect: must declare whether claims remain valid, narrow, suspend, withdraw, or require replacement
field_rules.conformance_effect: must declare none, revalidation_required, migration_required, claim_invalid, or successor_required
field_rules.lifecycle_effect: must map to a valid C14 transition
field_rules.rationale: must distinguish factual findings from governance judgment
